query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A close-up frontal portrait of a person with light skin and brown hair, illuminated by red light that falls across the face and neck. The individual looks directly at the camera with wide-open eyes and a tense brow. The background and outer portions of the frame are entirely black, and a light-colored garment is partially visible at the bottom edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up frontal portrait of a person bathed in intense red light that creates a sickly, unsettling crimson cast across the skin. Extreme underexposure crushes the background and surrounding hair into absolute blackness, producing a stark, oppressive atmosphere. The subject stares directly at the camera with wide eyes and a rigid expression, conveying fear and distress, while the suffocating darkness and unnatural red tones evoke a pervasive sense of dread.
